trades.reasoning: Top screener score of 100 with a volume surge confirmation — the strongest technical setup available today, RSI at 66.8 in the ideal momentum zone with all four bullish signals aligned.
Score 95 with RSI 64.3 and clean MACD momentum; Iridium's satellite communications business provides defensive characteristics on a mild down day, balancing the higher-beta MMED entry.

decisions.briefing: Markets pulled back mildly today (S&P -0.4%, NASDAQ -0.6%) in a neutral tape — not a risk-off signal, just digestion after recent gains. With four open slots and $1,208 in cash, I deployed into two high-conviction momentum names rather than sitting idle. MMED earns the top slot as the only score-100 candidate with a volume surge; IRDM adds a defensive satellite-comms name to balance sector exposure.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted lower on Tuesday, with the S&P 500 off 0.4% and the NASDAQ down 0.6% in light volume, reflecting a consolidation pause rather than broad selling pressure. Technology names led the modest decline as investors rotated toward defensive and value sectors following a strong May rally. No major macro catalyst drove the move — the session appeared to be routine profit-taking ahead of upcoming economic data.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週二小幅回落，標普500指數跌0.4%，納斯達克指數跌0.6%，整體成交量偏低，市場呈現整理格局而非恐慌性拋售。科技股承壓較明顯，資金小幅輪動至防禦性板塊及價值股，延續5月強勁升勢後的獲利了結走勢。本次回調缺乏明確宏觀催化因素，市場靜待後續重要經濟數據公佈。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Volume confirmation means a price move is more trustworthy when trading volume is significantly above average at the same time. When a stock breaks above a moving average or shows bullish MACD signals AND volume surges (as MMED did today at >1.5x its 20-day average), it signals that many participants agree with the move — not just a few large trades pushing the price temporarily.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量確認是指當股價出現突破或技術信號時，若同時伴隨顯著放量，則該信號的可信度大幅提升。以今日MMED為例，其成交量超過20日均量的1.5倍，配合MACD金叉及股價站穩均線，代表市場有大量參與者認同此上升趨勢，而非僅由少數大單短暫推動股價，訊號更具參考價值。
